suppressions.title: Legacy OAuth Implementation
suppressions.rationale: Using legacy OAuth flow for Google Ads API compatibility. Modern PKCE flow causes issues with existing integrations.
suppressions.mitigation: Isolated to specific API routes, input validation in place

suppressions.title: Third-party Analytics Scripts
suppressions.rationale: Google Analytics and other tracking scripts require inline execution for proper functionality
suppressions.mitigation: Strict CSP in place, scripts loaded from trusted domains only

suppressions.title: Environment Example Files
suppressions.rationale: Example environment files contain placeholder API key patterns for documentation purposes
suppressions.mitigation: Example files contain no real secrets, only documentation templates

suppressions.title: Development Environment Files
suppressions.rationale: Local development environment file, not committed to production
suppressions.mitigation: File is in .gitignore and contains only development test keys

suppressions.title: Legacy Data Structure Complexity
suppressions.rationale: Single large JSON file serves as database for 700+ tools. Refactoring to database would be major architectural change affecting entire application.

suppressions.title: Component Prop Drilling
suppressions.rationale: Comparison components require deep prop passing for tool data. Context API would add complexity for this specific use case.

suppressions.title: Mixed Async Patterns
suppressions.rationale: Legacy utility functions use different async patterns. Standardization planned for next refactor cycle.

suppressions.title: Legacy Comparison Table Styling
suppressions.rationale: Legacy comparison table uses custom styling that predates current design system. Refactoring requires UX research to maintain functionality while improving consistency.

suppressions.title: Accessibility Color Contrast Edge Cases
impacted_flows: Pricing display on tool detail pages
suppressions.rationale: Some pricing badges use brand colors that slightly miss WCAG contrast targets. Brand guidelines take precedence for badge elements.

suppressions.title: Mobile Navigation Complexity
suppressions.rationale: Mobile navigation includes many tool categories creating complex hierarchy. Simplification requires UX research and potential information architecture changes.

warnings: Suppression SEC-001 expiry exceeds maximum of 30 days (31 days)
